results.rendered_html:
urasya (wie eben) adj.
1〉 urasya in der Richtung der Brust gelegen (urasaikadik)  P. 4,3,114 .
— 2〉 wobei die Brust betheiligt ist, anstrengend (Arbeit): karmaṇā cāpyurasyena vakṣo yasya vidāritam  SUŚR. 2,447,4 .
— 3〉 urasya leiblich (Kind)  P. 4,4,94 .  AK. 2,6,1,28 .  H. 550 .
— 4〉 urasya vorzüglich (gleichsam eine Brust) gaṇa śākhādi zu  P. 5,3,103 .
— Vgl. aurasa.

results.rendered_html:
urasya a. [uras-yat]
1 Being in the breast.
2 Pectoral.
3 Requiring an effort of the chest (as any exertion).
4 Legitimate (a son or daughter); born from a married couple of the same tribe or caste.
5 Excellent.
— syaḥ A son.
